tasks.title: Finalize project requirements
tasks.description: Gather all requirements from stakeholders and document them in confluence.

tasks.title: Set up GitHub repository
tasks.description: Initialize the repo, set up branch protection rules, and invite team members.

tasks.title: Design Figma prototype
tasks.description: Create high-fidelity mockups for all core application screens.

tasks.title: Implement authentication flow
tasks.description: Add login, signup, and forgotten password functionality using NextAuth.

tasks.title: Create database schema
tasks.description: Design PostgreSQL database schema and write Prisma schema models.

tasks.title: Build Kanban board UI
tasks.description: Develop the main board view, including columns and mock card components.

tasks.title: Implement drag and drop
tasks.description: Use dnd-kit to allow users to move task cards between different columns.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for UI components
tasks.description: Ensure core UI components have test coverage using Jest and React Testing Library.

tasks.title: Integrate API with frontend
tasks.description: Connect the Kanban board to the backend endpoints for fetching and updating tasks.

tasks.title: Add dark mode support
tasks.description: Implement theme switching and ensure all components look good in dark mode.

tasks.title: Optimize performance
tasks.description: Analyze bundle size and optimize React re-renders on the main board.

tasks.title: Setup CI/CD pipeline
tasks.description: Create GitHub Actions workflow for automatic linting, testing, and deployment.
